description: Tray popover webview. Grants only the core baseline so the popover can receive live `portbay://status` / `portbay://metrics` events and resolve its own window. Privileged window ops (show / focus / hide the main window) and navigation are deliberately NOT granted here — they run Rust-side via the `open_main_window` and `quit_app` app commands — so the popover keeps a minimal surface with no shell, dialog, opener, or window-mutation permissions.
